name: Thai Chicken Coconut Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 block tofu, cubed into bite-size pieces
Serrano chillies or other hot chili (optional), seeded and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the coconut milk into a large pot and heat over medium heat.
2. Add chopped scallions, lemon grass in a tea ball, tofu pieces, chicken breasts, grated carrot, lime juice, hot chilies (if using), and fresh pepper (if desired).
3. Stir to combine all ingredients.
4. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the soup is hot throughout.
5. Remove the tea ball with lemon grass before serving. Taste and adjust seasoning by adding more lime juice or spicy peppers as needed.
